method_summary: MLE-bench uses Kaggle competitions to evaluate ML engineering skills of AI agents, with OpenAI's o1-preview and AIDE scaffolding as the best-performing setup.
key_innovation: Creation of MLE-bench, a benchmark that evaluates machine learning agents on real-world ML engineering tasks from Kaggle competitions.
best_result: OpenAI's o1-preview with AIDE scaffolding achieves at least the level of a Kaggle bronze medal in 16.9% of competitions
title: MLE-bench: Evaluating Machine Learning Agents on Machine Learning Engineering
